query: smeared blurred face featureless dissolved portrait abstraction
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/smeared_face — anti_aesthetic — dissolved portraits, featureless faces, painterly distortions

response.objective_caption: A close-up portrait of a person’s face partially visible behind wrinkled, translucent material. Warm amber and orange light illuminates the left side of the face, revealing one eye, the nose, and lips, while deep shadow and dark textured fabric occupy the right half of the frame. Folds and creases in the surface layer traverse the facial features, and a faint watermark is visible near the center.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal, dreamlike close-up of a face distorted behind wrinkled, degraded translucent material, evoking decay and atmospheric distress. The subject’s features dissolve into smeared, ambiguous texture beneath heavy creases, rendered beneath a sickly amber-orange cast and oppressive low contrast that crushes midtones into suffocating darkness. The composition rejects ordinary realism in favor of subconscious, unsettling logic.
